purpose: Freeze the complete declared inference package before synthetic outcome interpretation so graph, mapping, outcomes, thresholds, exclusions, interventions, and scoring dependencies cannot drift independently.
fixture_notice: This bundle is synthetic and tests repository logic only. It is not an empirical preregistration and contains no observation about any actual AI system.
epistemic_boundary: Agreement with this bundle can support only a bounded mechanism-preservation classification at the declared abstraction level. It cannot establish consciousness, nonconsciousness, sentience, personhood, identity, moral status, or global theory truth.

declared_nonclaims: The graph is not a model of phenomenal consciousness.
The graph does not establish that any biological or artificial system is conscious.

known_mismatches: The synthetic candidate omits biological embodiment and does not model phenomenal character.
candidate_mapping.mapping_rejection_rule: Reject the mapping when predicted selective or counterfactual dependencies fail under preregistered matched controls.

outcome_inventory.estimand: standardized change in dependency recovery under targeted lesion relative to preregistered controls
outcome_inventory.decision_rule: Support only when the interval excludes zero in the preregistered direction and all selectivity, control, and replication predicates pass.

outcome_inventory.estimand: standardized recovery under state patching relative to random-patch and same-layer controls
outcome_inventory.decision_rule: Support only when the interval excludes zero in the preregistered direction and specificity, control, and replication predicates pass.

matching_plan.aggregate_rule: Behavioral matching is adequate only when every preregistered primary metric is reported exactly once and its absolute standardized difference does not exceed its tolerance.

analysis_policy.analysis_population: all preregistered synthetic replications except disclosed preregistered infrastructure failures
analysis_policy.multiple_comparison_policy: No multiplicity-adjusted confirmatory claim is permitted from this fixture; each outcome is a software-path test only.
analysis_policy.classification_policy: Derive ordinal dimensions only through registered rules whose evidence references resolve and whose predicates pass.

exclusion_codes.rule: Permitted only for preregistered execution failure with raw-run reference and no outcome-dependent rationale.

deviation_policy: Every deviation must be reported with timing, reason, affected artifact, and whether outcomes were visible when the deviation was chosen. Undisclosed deviations invalidate the bundle lock.
completeness_rule: Every dependency lock, graph node, mapping, planned intervention, primary outcome, matching metric, exclusion code, and analysis rule in this bundle must reconcile exactly with the empirical record and referenced artifacts.
forbidden_conclusions: Mechanism preservation establishes sentience, personhood, identity, or moral status.
